## Completed Phases
### Phase 1: COMPLETED
Phase 1 delivered the identity and account-management backend for TypeTalk: Prisma models and migrations for users, identities, sessions, organizations, devices, email challenges, and security events, plus working Fastify routes for email OTP auth, Google sign-in/linking, refresh/logout, profile management, session management, and current-organization/member access. ### Phase 2: COMPLETED
Phase 2 built the backend sync layer for TypeTalk: dedicated device management endpoints, synced user preferences, organization-scoped dictionary CRUD, writing profiles, app profiles, and the shared idempotency infrastructure needed for safe repeated writes. ### Phase 3: COMPLETED
Phase 3 built TypeTalk’s Stripe billing and entitlement layer: database-backed plan seeding, billing read APIs, Stripe Checkout and Customer Portal endpoints, raw-body Stripe webhook verification, durable webhook receipt and retry processing, and the unified `GET /v1/entitlements/current` API. ### Phase 4: COMPLETED
Phase 4 built Google Play billing on top of the existing Stripe billing system, adding durable `purchase_tokens`, `POST /v1/billing/google-play/verify-subscription`, `POST /v1/billing/google-play/restore`, `POST /v1/webhooks/google-play/rtdn`, Google acknowledgment retry handling, and Google-aware unified entitlement and billing reads.
